subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Numerous letters from you have been received, but due to the intense upheaval at the Sacred Shrine, no opportunity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان نامه های متعدد از شما رسید و از شدت انقلاب بقعه مبارکه فرصت
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @universal peace; world unity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @relationship between government and people, @unity of governments; political unity, @obedience to and respect for government authority
